name: cirq
tagline: Reference skill for building, simulating, and running Cirq quantum circuits on Google, IonQ, Azure, AQT, and Pasqal hardware.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped reference skill: clear when-to-use triggers with named alternatives (qiskit/pennylane/qutip), pinned package versions, and a troubleshooting section for common failures. Hardware templates read provider API keys (IONQ_API_KEY, AZURE_QUANTUM_RESOURCE_ID, GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT) only via standard env-vars to call the vendor's own SDK locally,

highlights.summary: Hardware-execution templates (engine.get_sampler, ionq.Service, AzureQuantumService) can incur real cost/quantum-time on each call; the skill gives no explicit guard or warning against unintentionally
